name: CMB Law AI Legal Services
description: Direct API access to elite IP attorneys. File trademarks, draft patents, form entities, review contracts, manage IP portfolios, and generate legal documents — every submission is reviewed by an experienced attorney before action is taken.

auth.instructions: Register for an API key via POST /api/v1/register with org_name and org_email. Costs $5 per key. Payment via Stripe checkout — key is auto-provisioned and emailed on payment.

services.name: API Key Registration
services.description: Self-service API key registration. No existing authentication required. Submit org_name and org_email, complete $5 Stripe checkout, receive API key via email automatically.

services.name: Trademark Filing
services.description: File new trademark applications with the USPTO. Includes AI-powered conflict checking and attorney review.

services.name: Provisional Patent Application
services.description: File provisional patent applications. Requires problem/solution/differentiation description plus system diagrams.

services.name: Business Entity Formation
services.description: Form LLCs, corporations, and other business entities. Includes registered agent and EIN.

services.name: Trademark Monitoring Toolkit
services.description: Comprehensive toolkit with data sources, system prompts, conflict assessment criteria, and deadline references to enable your agent to perform trademark monitoring autonomously. Escalate to CMB via consultation or trademark filing endpoints when issues are detected.

services.name: IP Portfolio Status
services.description: Check the status of all matters, upcoming deadlines, and required actions.

services.name: Legal Document Generation
services.description: Generate NDAs, IP assignments, CIIAs, consulting agreements, license agreements, agent authorization frameworks, and agent-to-agent service agreements. All documents are attorney-reviewed before delivery.

services.name: Contract Review — Get Quote
services.description: Get a dynamic price quote for attorney review of an existing contract. Pricing based on contract type, page count, deal value, and complexity signals. Returns either a firm quote (under $1,000) or a consultation_required response.

services.name: Contract Review — Submit
services.description: Submit a contract for attorney review after receiving a quote under $1,000. Includes written risk analysis, missing protections, and recommended modifications. 15 contract types supported.

services.name: Contract Types Reference
services.description: List all supported contract types with their complexity multipliers. Use to classify contracts before requesting a quote.

services.name: IP Consultation Booking
services.description: Open an async consultation thread with Brannon McKay, Partner at CMB, for IP questions that don't fit predefined services.

services.name: Check Balance
services.description: Check your current Stripe-funded account balance.

services.name: Top Up Balance
services.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session to add funds to your account. Returns a checkout URL. Minimum $10.

services.name: Transaction History
services.description: Retrieve your billing transaction history — top-ups, service charges, and balance adjustments.

stripe_balance.description: Pre-fund your account via Stripe Checkout. Balance is deducted automatically on each request — no payment field needed.
